author: Austin Crawford
title: Miguel Dakota at Ballard's
summary: Get ready to be mesmerized by the incredible talent of Miguel Dakota at Ballard’s Beach Resort! As a finalist on Season 9 of America’s Got Talent, Miguel Dakota brings his electrifying vocals and captivating stage presence to our stage for an unforgettable performance. Join us for an evening of sensational music, soulful melodies, and unforgettable moments as Miguel Dakota takes the spotlight at Ballard’s. Don’t miss this opportunity to experience the magic of live music with one of America’s most talented artists!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Brennan McGuire at Ballard's
summary: ALL THE WAY FROM NASHVILLE! Indulge in the vibrant melodies of Brennan McGuire as he graces the stage at Ballard’s Beach Resort. Hailing from Nashville, Brennan brings the essence of country music to Block Island’s shores, infusing each performance with heartfelt lyrics and soulful tunes. Join us for an unforgettable experience as Brennan’s captivating vocals and acoustic rhythms set the perfect ambiance for your beachside retreat. Dive into the sounds of Nashville right here at Ballard’s and let the music transport you to a realm of relaxation and enjoyment.

author: Austin Crawford
title: John Brazile at Ballard's
summary: Get ready for an unforgettable evening of live music with John Brazile at Ballard’s Beach Resort! Returning for his 13th year residency, John Brazile brings the vibrant energy of Nashville straight to Block Island. With his soulful voice and captivating performance style, John will have you singing along and dancing the night away. Don’t miss your chance to experience the magic of John Brazile live at Ballard’s – it’s a night you won’t want to miss!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Voices from the Village
summary: Invited readers and reciters will present their favorite poems to Block Island.
content:
Invited readers and reciters will present their favorite poems to Block Island.

Please reserve this date and time on your calendar and play a most important role:  listener-responder.

The program will run approximately one hour.

Readers and musicians are community members who contribute to the well-being of Block Island.

They and their poems will not be revealed until the program.

We hope you will join us as we explore the variety and power of poetry

 

This event will take place at the Harbor Church 21 Water Street.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Magic Shows with Rob Martin
summary: Rob Martin is back this year with a whole new show! Rob Martin's Magic Show is now family friendly. 21+ can still bring your own wine. The show schedule and pricing have changed but it still has limited seating, so don't delay. Make sure you are signed up while you are here on vacation. You won't see this show anywhere else and it is the only magic show on Block Island!
content:
Rob Martin is back this year with a whole new show! Rob Martin's Magic Show is now family friendly. 21+ can still bring your own wine. The show schedule and pricing have changed but it still has limited seating, so don't delay. Make sure you are signed up while you are here on vacation. You won't see this show anywhere else and it is the only magic show on Block Island!

 

Excite your night, with Rob Martin's Magic Show, a visual and mental close-up magic show that gives you the rare opportunity to witness expert close-up magic. Join us, while we take a magical journey into the wild imagination of magician, Rob Martin. This isn’t your average kid’s magic show, but it is family friendly. To keep the show intimate and interactive, there will be no more than 25 guests per show. Please book online or call us to reserve your seat.

 

Rob Martin's Magic Show can be booked for private groups in house. Rob is also available for on location magic for events and parties. Please contact us via email or phone to inquire and check availability for private events.

 

Location: Block Island Ghost Tours on the second floor of the Odd Fellows Hall

Time: 8pm on Wednesdays, 6pm on Fridays, 4pm & 8pm on Saturdays

Length: 45 mins

Price: $40/person, $30 Children 12 & under

blockislandghosttours@gmail.com, 

401-477-2979

 

Click the link below for tickets.

author: Austin Crawford
title: USPS Forwarding Information
summary: There have been some changes to the USPS forwarding system and many Block Island summer residents have had issues forwarding their mail this season. I will be holding an informational meeting on forwarding at The Harbor Church on Tuesday, August 29 at 6:00PM to pass along all you need to know. Please come if you intend to forward your mail this year.
content:
There have been some changes to the USPS forwarding system and many Block Island summer residents have had issues forwarding their mail this season. I will be holding an informational meeting on forwarding at The Harbor Church on Tuesday, August 29 at 6:00PM to pass along all you need to know. Please come if you intend to forward your mail this year.
I hope to see you there!

author: Austin Crawford
title: The Spirits with Spirits Bar Crawl tour
summary: Do you like to frequent the local watering hole? It turns out that some of the souls from the past do as well on Block Island. Join Block Island Ghost Tours' founder, Rick Lysik, as your Ghost Host (tour guide) on the Island's only haunted pub crawl. Learn some of the tales of the haunted history of Block Island, as well as, some folklore and many ghost stories, while sipping on your favorite libations. This tour is 21+ and highly recommended to anyone looking to experience the Island's nightlife with a twist!
content:
Do you like to frequent the local watering hole? It turns out that some of the souls from the past do as well on Block Island. Join Block Island Ghost Tours' founder, Rick Lysik, as your Ghost Host (tour guide) on the Island's only haunted pub crawl. Learn some of the tales of the haunted history of Block Island, as well as, some folklore and many ghost stories, while sipping on your favorite libations. This tour is 21+ and highly recommended to anyone looking to experience the Island's nightlife with a twist!

 

This two and a half hour walking tour will quench your thirst for all things spooky. Starting at Block Island Ghost Tour headquarters and ending at the Island's most haunted bar, Club Soda, located in the basement of the the second oldest hotel on Block Island. Leave your car at your rental because a complimentary taxi ride will get you back safe and sound (maybe a bit frightened). When the tour is over, you can stay at Club Soda as long as you want, the kitchen will be open and Trivia starts at 9pm.

 

The $100/person ticket price includes a free drink at each of the 4 stops, a free taxi ride when you are ready to leave the last bar, a flashlight, an “I Survived” sticker, a $5 discount on any of our t-shirts, and stories to tell your friends. 

 

Call 401-477-2979 or email blockislandghosttours@gmail.com to book private group tours.

Location: Check-in at Block Island Ghost Tours on the second floor of the Odd Fellows Hall

Price: $100/person

Time: Mondays at 6pm or by request

Length: 2 1/2 hours

Walking Distance: Less than 1 Mile

 

Click the link below to book a tour.
